product.name: AutoStream
product.description: AutoStream is an AI-powered platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators. It turns raw footage into polished content with captions, cuts, and color grading in minutes, not hours.
product.tagline: Automated editing for Creators, YouTubers, Brands, and Studios

features.name: Smart Auto-Cut
features.description: AI detects silences, jump-cuts, and filler words — auto-removing dead air so every second counts

features.name: AI Captions
features.description: 98% accurate auto-transcription in 30+ languages. Styled, animated, and burnable in one click

features.name: One-Click Colour Grade
features.description: Pick a cinematic LUT preset or let AI analyse your footage and suggest the perfect grade

features.name: Audio Cleanup
features.description: Remove background noise, normalise levels, and add royalty-free music — all automatically

features.name: Batch Export
features.description: Export 1080p and 4K versions simultaneously in formats optimised for YouTube, Reels, and TikTok

features.name: AI Story Agent
features.description: Describe your vision in plain text; the agent assembles a rough cut from your clips

policies.support: 24/7 support available only on Pro plan
